positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a friendly celestial sloth hanging from an ornate branch, surrounded by glowing lunar flowers and crescent moons. The sloth has a gentle, dreamy expression. Composition should be centrally focused, utilizing strong black silhouettes contrasted against vibrant gradients of deep indigo, cosmic teal, and soft gold starlight. Use line-art elements combined with watercolor wash effects for depth. The style is sophisticated, ethereal, and slightly vintage, suitable for a modern apparel print. Focus on clean, high-contrast edges and limited color palette for printing.
